channel.title: Mathematics on Prabhat Lankireddy
channel.description: Recent content in Mathematics on Prabhat Lankireddy

item.title: Introduction to Sequential Decision Making
item.description: NOTE: This article was supposed to be a part of a series called "Learn with me" where I write about Online Machine Learning while I learn about it myself. The series, unfortunately, was discontinued and the second article never got out. Although it feels pointless and incomplete to have this post published, I can't get myself to remove it! So here it is, in all its glory, to remind me of my lack of consistency.

item.title: Duality
item.description: Growing up as a mathematics student taught me a thing or two about problem-solving, and most (if not all) math students love elegant solutions to problems. Back when I was 11th grade, the math teacher used to gave the entire class a small set of problems to solve, and discuss the solutions to these problems in the next class. The interesting thing was that he always discussed multiple ways to solve the same problem.
